message:
feat(ftui-text): add leading/baseline-grid and paragraph spacing system (bd-2vr05.15.2.4)

Implement deterministic vertical layout model with sub-pixel (1/256 px)
measurements: LeadingSpec (none/fixed/proportional), ParagraphSpacing
(CSS-style margin collapsing), BaselineGrid (snap-to-grid for column
alignment), VerticalPolicy (Compact/Readable/Typographic tiers), and
VerticalMetrics with paragraph_height/line_y/document_height/to_cell_rows.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
